name: William Walton
abstract: Sir William Turner Walton (29 March 1902 – 8 March 1983) was an English composer. During a sixty-year career, he wrote music in several classical genres and styles, from film scores to opera.

about_quotes.evidence: I wound up adapting two pieces of William Walton that bore no relevance to each other
